description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses debian:jessie as the default Docker image, runs a before_script that executes `sh ./install_dependencies.sh` and clones the Baserock definitions repository, and caches the path `$YBD_base`. Define stages `pep8`, `cache_keys`, `release_notes`, `build`, `test`, and `deploy`. In the `pep8` stage add a `check_pep8` job that runs `pycodestyle --show-source --show-pep8 --exclude definitions`. In the `cache_keys` stage add `cache_keys_v1` and `cache_keys_v6` jobs that each `cd definitions`, checkout a specific branch (`baserock-14.40` or `GENIVI-M1.0`), run `../ybd.py ci x86_64`, echo the expected hash into `expected.result`, and diff it against `ybd.result`, with variables `YBD_artifact_version` set to `1` or `6` and `YBD_mode=keys-only`. In the `build` stage add `check_build_debian_stretch`, `check_build_fedora_27`, `check_build_ubuntu_16.04`, `check_build_ubuntu_17.10` jobs that run only on the `master` branch, use the respective images, execute `./ybd.py definitions/systems/minimal-system-x86_64-generic.morph x86_64`, and set variables `YBD_check_definitions=exit` and `YBD_kbas_url=false-url`; also add `check_build_kbas` job (no image) that runs `./ybd.py definitions/systems/minimal-system-x86_64-chroot.morph x86_64` with `YBD_check_definitions=exit`. In the `release_notes` stage add a `check_release_notes` job that runs `./ybd.py definitions/systems/minimal-system-x86_64-generic.morph x86_64`, sets `YBD_mode=keys-only` and `YBD_release_note=${CI_PROJECT_DIR}/release-notes.txt`, and publishes `release-notes.txt` as an artifact; finally, in the `deploy` stage add a `check_deploy` job that runs `./ybd.py definitions/clusters/minimal-system-x86_64-chroot-deploy.morph x86_64`.
